title: [BUG] Formulae not included when inserting rows
author: tjvg91
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

When I execute `duplicateRow` to insert a new row, the formulae won't follow.

Lib version: 3.9.0

## Steps To Reproduce

```
const worksheet = workbook.getWorksheet(sheetName);
worksheet.duplicateRow(18, 1, true)
```

## The expected behaviour:

Expecting the formulae to copy also. Expecting also the other formulae in the rest of the worksheet to update

comments.author: Alanscut
agupta93
comments.body: @Alanscut I would like to take this up, if anyone else is already not working on it.

comments.author: pfouque06
comments.body:
@Alanscut I need this feature as well which is major as long as it is an ancestral and  fundamental inherent function of excell.
Thanks to push this one up.
To add design details, duplicate formulas should be update along used cell pointers, I.e
A1 = 0
A2 = A1+1
duplicate A2 to A3 should provide : A3 = A2 +1 (column id is updated within formula, except if it is fixed with '$' par design).

question is to also create a duplicate column method with same behaviors as well

comments.author: superxiaoao
comments.body:
> only supports copying values and styles, See

@Alanscut  Duplicate columns are not supported
